acceptance_checks.check: AHO_ITERATION env set before workstream_start emission
acceptance_checks.evidence: Set AHO_ITERATION=0.2.15 before emit_workstream_start call. Event logged with iteration=0.2.15.
Directories created: artifacts/iterations/0.2.15/{vetting,acceptance,audit}. Checkpoint updated to iteration 0.2.15.

acceptance_checks.check: All 4 LLMs have explicit status (no unknown)
acceptance_checks.evidence: Qwen: operational, Llama: operational, GLM: partial, Nemotron: compromised. Zero unknown.
Integration is implicit — dispatcher model-agnostic at /api/chat level. No code changes needed. Llama dispatches and responds correctly.

acceptance_checks.check: GLM re-test is clean-slate (not recycled 0.2.13 findings)
acceptance_checks.evidence: Fresh probes on fixed dispatcher (/api/chat, num_ctx=32768). 0.2.13 W2.5 findings compared but not reused as baseline. Evidence from 0.2.15 dispatcher only.

acceptance_checks.check: Nemotron re-test is clean-slate (not recycled 0.2.13 findings)
acceptance_checks.evidence: Fresh probes including specific classify task. 0.2.13 feature-bias finding compared but evidence is from 0.2.15 fixed dispatcher.

acceptance_checks.check: Raw response inspection performed for each probe
acceptance_checks.evidence: All raw_response fields captured and inspected. Template tokens identified in GLM raw response. Persona hallucination identified in Nemotron raw response. No parsed-JSON-only characterization.

12 failures, 303 passed, 1 skipped. 11 of 13 baseline failures present. 2 baseline failures absent (daemon_healthy likely skipped, gate_verbosity possibly fixed). 1 environmental failure (test_cascade_end_to_end — model swap during vetting). No new failures from W0 code changes (W0 made no src/aho/ code changes).
W0 introduced no new code in src/aho/. Pre-existing G083 site noted at workstream_events.py:70-71 (except Exception: pass) — not W0-introduced.

findings.description: Checkpoint iteration field not updated by emit_workstream_start — required manual bump from 0.2.14 to 0.2.15

test_workstream_events.py checkpoint corruption recurred. Tests wrote W_V3_TEST, W_V3_COMBO, W_V2_COMPAT, W_V1_COMPAT, W_V2_TEST, W_V1_TEST, W_PARSE_TEST, W_V1_DEFAULT to real checkpoint. Also set W0 to workstream_complete and current_workstream to W6. Checkpoint manually restored. This is the same carry-forward from 0.2.14.
GLM 0.2.13 W2.5 finding (80% timeout, wrong-schema JSON) was substrate artifact of broken dispatcher. On fixed dispatcher: zero timeouts, correct JSON, template token leakage only.

Nemotron 0.2.13 W2.5 finding (80% feature-bias) was substrate artifact. On fixed dispatcher: classify returns 'bug' correctly. New failure mode: identity confusion (returns 'BERT' when asked model name).
Pre-existing G083 site at src/aho/workstream_events.py:70-71 (except Exception: pass in emit_workstream_start checkpoint update). Not introduced by W0.
Dispatcher hardcodes Qwen stop tokens for all models. Llama shows no leakage (Ollama handles template server-side), GLM shows template token leakage (<|begin_of_box|>/<|end_of_box|>). W2 scope.
test_cascade_end_to_end failure is environmental — GLM 8GB model load during vetting displaced Qwen from VRAM. Not a code regression.

roster_summary.pillar_7_path: GLM is Auditor candidate for W4 cross-model cascade. Nemotron usable for classification/triage. Pillar 7 restoration attempt meaningful with 3-4 model roster.

cross_project_contamination.notes: No cross-project contamination observed during W0. All pillar references verified against aho canonicals (11 pillars). No kjtcom version labels or ADR numbers fabricated.
